forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Becoming cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning westerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 31.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Nullarbor from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to northwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west from the late morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 31 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 36.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 37.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 37.
